name: Woo Sung Castle Hill Country Club
notes: Also known as Rachaburi Country Club. Located in Chom Bueng district, Ratchaburi province (not Kanchanaburi province, but grouped in the Kanchanaburi/River Kwai corridor by many golf booking sites). Address: 79 Moo 12, Tambol Jombung, Amphur Jombung, Ratchaburi 70150. Designer confirmed as Pichein Vickayanon per GolfLux. Course length 6,863 yards (Blue tees: 6,180 yards, White: 5,541 yards, Red: 4,972 yards). Green fees weekday THB 700, weekend THB 1,200 per 1golf.eu. Email: rachaburi@rachaburi.com. GPS coordinates from Deemples (lat 15.87, lon 100.99) appear incorrect for this location (Chom Bueng Ratchaburi should be ~13.62N, 99.59E) — left as null pending verification. Ratchaburi city is ~103 km from Bangkok; Chom Bueng is deeper in the province, estimated ~150 km and ~2.5 hrs. Cart rentals available (electrocart). Sources: 1golf.eu, GolfLux, Deemples, birdie.in.th
